Decision: Replace list() with [] and dict() with {} in PrepareBatchExtraInput.__call__
Rationale: Using [] and {} is semantically the same as list() and dict() but likely slightly better in performance due to reduced dictionary lookups and temporary objects
Author: benediktjohannes
Cost: Low (trivial changes with minimal resource impact)
Risk: Minimal (no control-flow or error-handling changes, only container initialization optimization)

Argument.author: benediktjohannes
Argument.argument: Using [] and {} is semantically the same as list() and dict() but likely slightly better in performance due to reduced dictionary lookups and temporary objects

Argument.author: benediktjohannes
Argument.argument: Could you maybe open an extra PR for your additional suggestions and merge this for now, so that we can check on the more complex (and test requiring) changes lateron, but already have these safe slight improvements?
